prestazioni: 5E-FHE (5E-FTE turbo conversion) with forged internals: Wiseco 83mm forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set for high-RPM power. Turbocharged with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 (0.86 A/R turbine, 0.64 A/R compressor) on a custom tubular manifold by HKS, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler and 3-inch stainless steel piping. Fuel system upgraded with Walbro 255 LPH pump, ID1000 injectors, and AEM F/IC for precise AFR control via Haltech Elite 1500 ECU.

6-speed manual swap from a Toyota Celica GT-Four (ST205) with a custom bellhousing adapter by KAAZ, paired with a Cusco Type-RS 2-way LSD (1.5/2.0) and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch. Drivetrain reinforced with a TRD 4.3 final gear ratio and custom half-shafts by Driveshaft Shop to handle increased torque.

Full chassis reinforcement: Cusco front strut tower bar, Ultra Racing 4-point front lower arm bar, and a custom rear subframe brace by Buddy Club. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8K/10K spring rates), SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, rear trailing arms), and Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with AP Racing CP5250 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PB-SR-01 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (hand-laid by Seibon), paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Varis. Rear wing replaced with a custom 1-piece carbon fiber GT wing by APR Performance (30mm risers, 1500mm span) for high-speed stability.

Custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Sabelt 6-point harnesses), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a full custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, bolt-in, with harness bar). Gauges upgraded to Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) in a custom A-pillar pod by JDM Garage.

Exterior lighting converted to full LED: Philips Ultinon Pro9000 (headlights), Depo Racing JDM-spec taillights (clear lens, red/amber LEDs), and custom Hella Rallye 4000 fog lights integrated into the front bumper. Paint scheme: House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red over a silver metallic base with custom gold leaf accents on the Toyota emblem and side stripes (applied by a specialist in Osaka).
